Overview

Explore the San Francisco market

Rofo helps businesses research commercial real estate in San Francisco, CA. Use this page as a starting point to understand the market, review building options, and narrow your search.

Whether you are looking for office space, retail frontage, or industrial property, Rofo is designed to make market discovery easier and more efficient.

Why Rofo

Start your search with market context

Rofo helps businesses discover commercial real estate by market first, then drill into buildings and location options.

  • Explore markets city by city
  • Review representative buildings
  • Get help narrowing your search
  • Connect with the right next step
